entities.article_title: Breakthrough Prize 2026 went to Philadelphia gene therapy pioneers
entities.event_summary: Three Philadelphia scientists won a $3 million Breakthrough Prize for developing the first FDA-approved gene therapy for a genetic disease.

The Breakthrough Prize has recognized scientists for developing gene therapies for inherited blindness, sickle cell disease, and beta-thalassemia, and identifying a key genetic cause of ALS and frontotemporal dementia.
